evidence_quote: From the homepage (Misión): "El objetivo de DRUGMEX es cubrir el servicio de Tercero o Contract Manufacturing (CMO) de productos inyectables estériles en las formas farmacéuticas liofilizados y soluciones en ampollas y viales, para consumo humano."
disqualifier_reason: pure sterile fill-finish CMO (lyophilized/solution injectables in vials and ampoules) with no antibody bioprocessing or antibody program disclosed

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Together as a team we can deliver end-to-end results for your oligonucleotide drug development program." and "Nitto Avecia Pharma Services is your single source for high-quality analytical testing services for the pharma, biotech, and medical device industries."
disqualifier_reason: oligonucleotide-focused analytical testing CRO; no antibody-based molecule or antibody service line (oligo focus, not AOC/antibody conjugates)

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "As a purpose-fueled drug delivery CDMO, we leverage our specialist injectable, inhalation and dermal expertise to accelerate your product's journey." From the Sterile injectables page: "Kindeva supports sterile injectable programs with aseptic fill finish, tech transfer and injectable device expertise."
disqualifier_reason: drug-delivery / drug-device CDMO (inhalation, nasal, dermal, sterile fill-finish, microneedle); fill-finish and device assembly only, no antibody drug-substance development or antibody program. NOTE: domain kindevadd.com is Kindeva Drug Delivery; 'Meridian Medical Technologies' (Pfizer EpiPen unit / autoinjectors) is a separate legacy entity, not the same renamed company as Kindeva, but they share the autoinjector/drug-device space and the record maps to Kindeva Drug Delivery's live site.

programs: Biopharmaceutical Services (large molecule analytical method development, validation and testing)
evidence_quote: From the Services page (Biopharmaceutical Services): "QCL provides large molecule analytical method development, validation and testing. QCL's capabilities include protein identity, potency, stability, and concentration as well as enzyme assays and host cell contamination."
disqualifier_reason: analytical-testing / CDMO doing large-molecule QC testing and clinical-trial-material manufacturing of finished dosage forms; generic large-molecule analytics with no antibody-based therapeutic program or antibody bioprocessing service line

programs: GMP antibody production, IHC antibodies, IVD reagents, contract manufacturing of antibodies/antigens
evidence_quote: From the homepage (Corporate Overview): "SDIX is a wholly owned subsidiary of OriGene Technologies, specializing in high quality, large-scale GMP antibody production in the U.S, Delaware and Maine ... developing results-oriented and innovative antibody-based solutions that enable customers to meet high performance diagnostic and commercialization objectives." Products: "Better antigens, better antibodies and better assays for IVD, anatomic pathology, biotechnology and pharmaceutical markets."
disqualifier_reason: reagent/antibody supplier for IVD, IHC and diagnostics (mono/polyclonal antibodies, antigens, assays); diagnostics/reagent antibody manufacturer, not a next-generation-antibody therapeutic developer or ngAbs bioprocessing CDMO (and a reagent-supplier/competitor type)

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Woodstock Sterile Solutions is one of the leading contract development and manufacturing (CDMO) companies for aseptic pharmaceutical manufacturing of sterile liquid formulations" via "blow-fill-seal (BFS) technology" with "Industry-Leading Ophthalmic and Respiratory Experience."
disqualifier_reason: blow-fill-seal sterile liquid CDMO focused on ophthalmic/respiratory liquid formulations; sterile fill-finish only, no antibody bioprocessing or antibody program

evidence_quote: no evidence found (site cellgenesys.com returned empty content on https and http; Cell Genesys was a gene/cell-therapy biotech that ceased operations / merged with BioSangamo-era successors c. 2009, so no live site is available to classify)
no evidence found (draxis.com / www.draxis.com unreachable: https connection refused and empty content on retry; site inaccessible during free-fetch run)
